subject: An explosive eruption of fiery, molten energy bursting upward from a rocky crucible, with a bright incandescent core radiating heat and sparks
description: A vertical column of incandescent flame and molten energy erupts upward from a dark rocky basin, framed by jagged silhouettes of stone or cavern walls. The core of the blast is a brilliant white-yellow, surrounded by concentric layers of orange and red firelight that bleed into the smoky darkness above. Sparks and embers scatter outward, and the heat-glow rim-lights the surrounding rock with a deep crimson cast. There are no figures present — the artwork is a pure elemental event, an unleashing of raw magical fire suggestive of a ritual ignition or volcanic vent.
foreground: rocky basin or crucible silhouetted against the eruption, jagged stone edges
background: billowing smoke and fire-glow rising into a dark sky, embers scattered across the upper field
emotion: explosive, eruptive, awe-inducing — raw elemental release
